title: Look & Learn
description: Pre-reading visual recognition: shapes, colors, animals and objects. Fully narrated, no reading required.

items.label: Circle
items.narration: This is a circle. Round like the sun!

items.label: Square
items.narration: This is a square. It has four sides.

items.label: Triangle
items.narration: This is a triangle. Three pointy corners!

items.label: Star
items.narration: This is a star. Twinkle twinkle!

items.label: Heart
items.narration: This is a heart. I love hearts!

items.label: Red
items.narration: This color is red. Like a juicy apple!

items.label: Blue
items.narration: This color is blue. Like the big sky!

items.label: Yellow
items.narration: This color is yellow. Like the bright sun!

items.label: Green
items.narration: This color is green. Like the grass!

items.label: Purple
items.narration: This color is purple. Like a grape!

items.label: Cat
items.narration: This is a cat. The cat says meow!

items.label: Dog
items.narration: This is a dog. The dog says woof!

items.label: Cow
items.narration: This is a cow. The cow says moo!

items.label: Duck
items.narration: This is a duck. The duck says quack!

items.label: Frog
items.narration: This is a frog. The frog says ribbit!

items.label: Ball
items.narration: This is a ball. Let's bounce it!

items.label: Car
items.narration: This is a car. Vroom vroom!

items.label: Cup
items.narration: This is a cup. For a yummy drink!

items.label: Hat
items.narration: This is a hat. Pop it on your head!

items.label: Sun
items.narration: This is the sun. Warm and bright!
